name: Somercotes and Riddings

locations.address:
Alfreton Safer Neighbourhood Teams,
Hall St,
Alfreton,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Somercotes, Swanwick, Ironville, Riddings, Leabrooks and Pye Bridge. It belongs to the Amber Valley Local Policing Unit. 
All of these villages are located within the Amber Valley Borough Council area and are situated between the towns of Alfreton and Ripley. The area also has excellent road links with the A38 and the M1 motorway.
